mapper.sql: id, name_cn, name_en, path, method, auth_type, category_id, status, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.name_cn AS category_name FROM openplatform_v2_api_t a LEFT JOIN openplatform_v2_category_t c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_api_t SET name_cn = #{nameCn}, name_en = #{nameEn}, path = #{path}, method = #{method}, auth_type = #{authType}, category_id = #{categoryId}, status = #{status}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
